author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
I am grateful for President Trump’s trust in me to lead the U.S. Department of Homeland Security. It’s an honor to serve.

As @DHSgov Secretary, I’m committed to safeguarding the American people and protecting the homeland. I’ll fight for your family just as I’ll fight for mine.

I look forward to standing shoulder to shoulder with the 260,000 outstanding DHS employees and their families to keep our nation safe.

My first priority is to end the partisan fighting and reopen the U.S. Department of Homeland Security as a matter of national security.

Let’s get to work. 🇺🇸

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Honoring a Coast Guard Hero. 🇺🇸
 
This week, the Coast Guard conducted a Dignified Arrival for Aviation Survival Technician (AST2) Tyler Jaggers.

Following a ceremony at Joint Base Lewis-McChord in Tacoma, Washington, a C-130 transported AST2 Jaggers and his family to Joint Base Andrews. In the presence of the Commandant of the Coast Guard,  Coast Guard servicemembers, and loved ones, the Ceremonial Honor Guard received AST2 Jaggers’ casket and rendered honors.
 
AST2 Jaggers made the ultimate sacrifice while exhibiting extraordinary courage in the face of danger. In recognition of his heroism, Jaggers was advanced to Petty Officer Second Class and awarded the Distinguished Flying Cross.
 
We are forever grateful for his selfless and unwavering devotion to serving our nation, and upholding the @USCG’s highest calling: to save the lives of others.

Please join us in praying for his family, fellow crew members, and loved ones.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Thank you @POTUS Trump and @SecScottBessent, for providing DHS employees who have gone without pay for almost 50 days an automatic extension on their tax filling. 

Through this new agreement, they will be granted a grace period where they won’t be required to file their taxes until May 15, 2026.
 
During the Democrats’ reckless shutdown, the hardworking men and women of @DHSgov have continued to work around the clock without pay to protect the homeland. Democrats must re-open DHS.

tweets.text:
Today, I had the opportunity to meet the fearless State and Local leaders of western North Carolina who are rebuilding their communities after the devastation of Hurricane Helene. 

I saw first hand hurricane damage still present and will be making sure @FEMA relief continues to help Americans rebuild their homes and communities.

I am humbled and honored to serve the citizens of our great Homeland. Thanks for having me.

We toured the world class rescue facilities and met with the fearless men and women who protect our maritime borders. 

Thanks for keeping our country safe.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.
Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
In the wake of Typhoon Sinlaku, @DHSgov and @FEMA continue to support locally led disaster response efforts in Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands (CNMI).

Together with territorial partners and other federal agencies, FEMA’s top priority is helping identify urgent needs and stabilizing critical lifelines like power, water, and communications.

Thank you @POTUS Trump for approval of two emergency declarations providing federal resources and technical expertise, including 400 FEMA and federal staff to assist in these efforts.

Our prayers are with those who have been affected by the storm. We will continue to work around the clock to ensure a safe and smooth recovery on the islands.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
My prayers are with everyone in Oklahoma impacted by last night’s tornadoes and severe storms, especially those in Enid, Garfield County, Gray Ridge, and Vance AFB. As an Oklahoman, I know how resilient our communities are, but I also know the heartbreak these events can bring.
 
State and local responders are leading the way, and @DHSgov and @FEMA are fully engaged. The FEMA team, including the acting Regional Administrator, is on the ground today working closely with Oklahoma officials to assess needs and support recovery.
 
This is just the start of a multi-day severe weather pattern across the Southern Plains and lower Mississippi Valley. Please stay alert, follow local guidance, and take all warnings seriously. Protecting American lives is always our top priority.

Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
After 76 days, the longest government shutdown in history is over. 

@DHSgov is back open, @ICEgov and @CBP will be funded through reconciliation (with NO Democrat votes) so liberals can’t play games with federal law enforcement funding.

To be clear, this Democrat shutdown NEVER should have happened.

To our great, patriotic employees who have continued to protect the homeland every single day without a guaranteed paycheck—thank you. President Trump and I are very grateful to be in the fight with you to Make America Safe Again.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
It was a true honor to attend the @CBP Valor Memorial and Wreath Laying Ceremony this morning and visit with the families of our fallen heroes.

In 2016, the Lord put a saying on my heart: “love the people, love the call.” 

Our CBP officers and their families demonstrate the ultimate act of love by putting their lives on the line to protect their fellow citizens every single day.

Today, we remember Border Patrol Agent David Maland, Supervisory Border Patrol Agent Eric Cespedes, and all of the heroes lost in the line of duty. 

We will never forget. 

God bless our federal law enforcement.

tweets.text:
This morning, I was on the ground with the men and women of @icegov law enforcement in Virginia. 

We arrested a criminal illegal, removed multiple times from our country, whose rap sheet includes drug possession and driving under the influence. 
 
Governor Spanberger’s sanctuary policies have made Virginia a magnet for criminal illegal aliens.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Today, @POTUS Trump and I honored the @USCG Academy 2026 graduating class of cadets. 

These men and women embody the best of America — a selfless commitment to service and a willingness to stand up and protect their homeland. 

Congratulations to all the graduates. https://t.co/f9WHu3bkbs

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Today, I had the privilege of joining @POTUS Trump at the @USCGAcademy graduation as we paid tribute to the 2026 class of cadets.

These men and women are heroically answering the call to service to defend and protect our homeland and our freedoms. 

May God bless them as they faithfully serve our nation.
